Battery care

Charge the rover battery before long field sessions.

Maintenance

Inspect the rover wheels after each rocky traverse.

Storage

Keep replacement batteries in a dry compartment away from dust.

Currents

Cold currents move nutrients toward coastal ecosystems.

Whales migrate through colder water regions during feeding seasons.

Coral reefs

Reefs depend on stable temperature ranges and clear water.
